---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: R
    language: R
    name: ir
---

```{r}
library(caret)
library(kernelshap)
library(shapviz)

data <- read.csv("./data/daF3077_eng.csv", sep = ";")
```

```{r}
caret_model <- train(
    v4_1 ~ bv1 + bv2 + bv4,
    data = data,
    method = "svmLinear",
)

summary(caret_model$finalModel)
```

```{r}
set.seed(10)
```

```{r}
xvars <- c("bv1", "bv2", "bv4") ## variables used for training

to_be_examined <- data[sample(nrow(data), 100), xvars]
```

```{r}
shap <- permshap(caret_model, to_be_examined)
```

```{r}
viz <- shapviz(shap)
sv_importance(viz)
sv_dependence(viz, xvars)
```
